changelog: NEW: Auto-record option in Add Chaturbate Model form
NEW: Checkbox to enable/disable automatic recording per model
NEW: Internal notification system with popup notifications
NEW: Quick toggle button in header to enable/disable notifications
NEW: Animated visual notification when a model goes live
NEW: Automatic status change detection (offline -> online)
NEW: Clickable notification to access stream directly
NEW: Viewer count display in notifications
NEW: Watch live streams without recording (view-only mode)
NEW: Status displays 'Live (Watching)' when viewing without recording
NEW: API endpoint to get stream URL for online models
FIX: Removed forced recording when opening model page
FIX: Auto-record checkbox now properly controls automatic recording
FIX: Backend now checks database before starting automatic recordings
FIX: Models with auto-record disabled no longer start recording automatically
IMPROVED: Add model form with better control over auto-recording
IMPROVED: Simplified notification system (one-click toggle)
IMPROVED: Real-time model status monitoring (15 seconds)
IMPROVED: Silent notifications (no sound)
IMPROVED: Smart TS to MP4 conversion system - scans all .ts files and converts only those not being recorded
IMPROVED: Automatic detection of active recording sessions to avoid converting files in use
IMPROVED: Auto-cleanup of .ts files after successful MP4 conversion to save disk space
IMPROVED: Uniformisation complète du système de logs pour une meilleure lisibilité
IMPROVED: Suppression des emojis redondants dans les logs (gérés automatiquement par le formatter)
IMPROVED: Standardisation des messages de logs avec paramètres nommés cohérents
IMPROVED: Format de logs structuré et colorisé pour faciliter le débogage
REMOVED: Browser system notifications (privacy-focused)
REMOVED: Notification sound system
REMOVED: Settings modal for notifications
